title: QS parse handles bracket notation and repeated keys
prompt: Fix parseQuery so it matches qs-style parsing for this benchmark slice: repeated flat keys should become arrays, bracket notation should build nested objects, and scalar URL decoding should still work.
golden_patch_description: Match a narrow qs.parse slice for repeated keys, array shorthand, nested bracket notation, and scalar URL decoding.
instance_notes: Compact qs parse slice derived from repeated-key and bracket-notation semantics in the qs README and upstream parse tests.
